title: Junior Instructional Designer at TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Join the TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services family as a Instructional Designer in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services:
TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TeamLease Skills University Holdings Services!
